seo.title: Marc Casellas | NetDevOps & Photography
seo.description: Marc Casellas Portfolio. Computer engineer specialized in NetDevOps and automation. Passionate about travel, mountain and street photography.

home.title: MARC CASELLAS
home.subtitle: COMPUTER ENGINEER (UPC) / PHOTOGRAPHY / RADIO
home.p1: Hi, I'm Marc. Born in Osona, Catalonia.
home.p2: I'm a <1>computer engineer</1> by profession, specialized in NetDevOps, monitoring and automation.
home.p3: Outside the technical field, I'm passionate about capturing and telling stories. I do it through photography, specially street, travel and landscape photography, and also from the radio. This space collects a part of this more personal and creative side.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Computer Engineer (UPC) specialized in <1>infrastructure monitoring, automation</1> and the deployment of critical services (<3>NetDevOps</3>). Strong background in <5>Python</5> and <7>Cloud environments (GCP/Docker)</7>. Passionate about observability, operational efficiency, and network security.

items: <1>Automation & Cloud: Process orchestration with Python and deployment of microservices in containers (Docker) across on-premise and cloud environments (GCP / BigQuery).
<1>Monitoring & HA: Designed Zabbix monitoring architectures with reactive and predictive alerting. Management of critical systems (RADIUS, DHCP, DNS, IPAM) in high availability (HA).
<1>DevOps & CI/CD:</1> Implementation of CI/CD cycles and software best practices (Git, documentation) in collaboration with dev and operations teams.
<1>Cybersecurity: Deployment and policy definition for perimeter firewalls (NGFW).
<1>Homologation:</1> CPE equipment testing and validation before production rollout.
Design of the new network architecture and definition of technical standards.
Improved observability through data homogenization in Zabbix.
Topology and routing design, GPON troubleshooting, and XGSPON homologation.
<1>Delivery:</1> Integration of new nodes, DWDM migrations, M&A network integrations, and PoP deployments.
<1>NOC:</1> Resolution of critical CORE network incidents (Tier 3) and support for enterprise clients (FiberOffice, EVPN, IP-Transit).

education.title: Education
education.thesis: <1>Thesis:</1> <3>QoS implementation in an ISP</3> – Implementation of quality of service policies for residential traffic.

radio.item1: Server administration (streaming, broadcasting) and network maintenance.
radio.item2: Automation: Developed a distributed contribution system for remote users.
